name: cowork-session-fixer
description: Fixes the 'RPC error: process with name already running' bug in Claude Cowork by detecting and clearing orphaned session processes. Works on Windows and macOS.

pillars.supervised: User confirmation required before archiving sessions or killing processes
pillars.orchestrated: Plan > Act > Verify pattern with structured output report
pillars.secured: Local filesystem only, no credentials, no external access
